title: maytenus albata
intro: Maytenus albata, also known as 'White Mayten,' is a plant species in the family Celastraceae, native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains a compound called maytansine, a potent inhibitor of the enzyme topoisomerase I, used in some cancer treatments. The health benefits of Maytenus albata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Maytenus albata can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
